name: io.github.etanhey/voicelayer
title: VoiceLayer
description: Voice I/O for AI agents — local TTS via edge-tts, on-device STT via whisper.cpp. 11 MCP tools with ToolAnnotations. Press F6, speak, ship. No cloud, no API keys.

environmentVariables.name: QA_VOICE_STT_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: STT backend: whisper (local, default), wispr (cloud), or auto

environmentVariables.name: QA_VOICE_WISPR_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Wispr Flow API key for cloud STT fallback

environmentVariables.name: QA_VOICE_WHISPER_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Path to whisper.cpp GGML model file (auto-detected from ~/.cache/whisper/)
